backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AI Image Studio backend; handles image generation via Hugging Face HTTP outcalls, manages pose criteria, presets, prompt history, and environment variables, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, primary, accent, destructive, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script entry point to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient and ThemeProvider, manages image generation state, and renders a two-column layout with a sticky form panel on the left and image display plus prompt history on the right.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the current year copyright and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component showing the AI Image Studio logo with a gradient icon and a 'Powered by Hugging Face' subtitle.
frontend/src/components/ImageDisplay.tsx: Component that renders the generated image, a loading spinner, or user-friendly error messages with specific handling for HF API error codes (401, 503, 429, 400) and IC canister traps.
frontend/src/components/ImageGenerationF: Comprehensive image generation form component with controls for art style, aspect ratio, model selection, negative prompt presets, camera settings, lighting, environment, body type, and emotion prompts.
frontend/src/components/PromptHistory.ts: Displays a collapsible card listing past prompts sorted by timestamp, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each entry.
frontend/src/constants/emotions.ts: Defines emotion types and a list of emotions (joy, sadness, anger, fear) with three intensity levels each, plus a helper to build keyword strings from a selected emotion and intensity.
frontend/src/constants/negativePrompts.t: Exports a set of named negative prompt presets (e.g. Low Quality, Blur & Noise) as string constants for use in image generation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for image generation and prompt history, including response parsing utilities that handle various Hugging Face API error formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining dark and light theme CSS custom properties (colors, radius, sidebar) plus fade/slide-in animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch CSS variables, border radii, fonts, shadows, animations) and enabling dark mode, typography, animate, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 3) describing a single pending fix request (AR-1) to resolve a navigation dropdown overlap/z-index issue where open dropdown list items crowd adjacent menu headings.
